_comment: Copy to perfscript.config.json (gitignored) and fill in. All optional.
_jmeterHome_note: Use forward slashes (valid in JSON + Node on Windows).

openai._comment: Preferred AI provider for --agent. Acts as a constrained senior performance engineer and returns safe JSON patches only. Leave apiKey blank to use OPENAI_API_KEY or fall back to Gemini.

gemini._comment: Optional fallback provider. Used only when OpenAI is not configured. Default model is Gemini 3.5 Flash; use --gemini-pro for Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview.

agent._comment: Safe bounded agent mode. AI returns JSON suggestions only; the app applies approved patch types and re-runs JMeter.

learning._comment: Verified Learning Store. Saves only redacted lessons after green JMeter verification; imports/exports sanitized team bundles.

inputState._comment: Tracks processed input files by path/size/modified time so unchanged JMX/HAR/XML files are skipped across agent restarts.

successArchive._comment: When Validate/Agent finishes GREEN, write a ZIP copy to output/successful while keeping normal output files readable.

run._testObjective_comment: Required for senior PE judgment. Examples: single-scenario certification, stress/capacity, soak/endurance, search/cache-behavior, spike. If blank, the agent assumes mixed-load capacity and reports that assumption.
run._disableCalls_comment: App/flow-specific samplers to disable, matched by testname/path substring. Generic browser telemetry and standard OIDC plumbing (/authorize/resume, /oauth/token, /logout) are disabled by default in code; put YOUR app's vendor callback paths or step-numbered noise here.
run._oauth_comment: dropBareStateNonce: opt-in per flow. When true, bare state/nonce correlations are removed and the recorded literals stay in /authorize. Leave false for standard OAuth flows that need fresh state threaded.
run._allowJsr223_comment: Default false. Leave JSR223/Groovy helpers stripped for Java-safe JMXs. Set true only when you deliberately need generated Groovy helpers and have a compatible JMeter/Java runtime.
run._protectedCalls_comment: Optional business-critical samplers matched by testname/path substring. Protected calls must execute and cannot be disabled by repair.
run._parameterization_comment: Optional guardrails for test-data parameterization. Exclude protocol/auth/session/signature fields from CSV data; include only stable user/business data.
run._llmFlowNotes_comment: Flow-specific guidance appended to the AI escalation prompt (which endpoints are plumbing for THIS app, etc). Keep app names/paths here, not in code.
run._scenario_comment: Business objective -> load model (Little's Law). Give transactionsPerHour OR concurrentUsers; the designer derives threads, ramp, pacing (Precise Throughput Timer) and CSV pool size, with the math in <flow>_scenario.md. Explicit loadProfile below still wins.
run._loadProfile_comment: Optional load shape. Honored at both generate-only and --run. holdSec forces infinite loops + scheduler (whichever finishes first wins — don't combine finite loops with a duration). Omit any field to keep the engine default.
